summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS QR Table Ordering Feature (Iteration 19). All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified - QR Guest Menu loads at /menu/rest_demo_1/KrGTedTy, shows restaurant name, categories, products with GBP prices, category filtering works, add to cart with quantity controls, floating cart bar, cart sheet with guest name input, place order creates pending order, order confirmation screen with 3D cloche image. POS screen loads with 74 pending orders. Socket.IO server emitting new_qr_order events.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails in browser with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - likely due to preview environment proxy. Backend Socket.IO is working correctly (emitting events).
integration_issues.note: This is expected in preview environment. Socket.IO falls back to polling which works.

critical_code_review_comments: GuestMenu.js: Public page at /menu/:restaurantId/:tableHash - NO AUTH REQUIRED
GuestMenu.js: Uses axios to fetch menu from /api/qr/{restaurantId}/{tableHash}
GuestMenu.js: Shows restaurant name, table badge, hero image, category tabs, product cards with GBP prices
GuestMenu.js: Cart functionality with add/remove, quantity controls, floating cart bar, cart sheet
GuestMenu.js: Order confirmation screen with 3D cloche image and 'Order Sent to Kitchen' message
qr_menu.py: Admin endpoints (auth required): GET /api/qr/tables/hashes, POST /api/qr/tables/generate-all-hashes
qr_menu.py: Public endpoints (no auth): GET /api/qr/{restaurant_id}/{table_hash}, POST /api/qr/{restaurant_id}/{table_hash}/order
qr_menu.py: Order placement emits WebSocket event via emit_new_qr_order()
socket_manager.py: Socket.IO server with join_restaurant, new_qr_order, order_update events
server.py: Socket.IO wrapped around FastAPI via socketio.ASGIApp(sio, other_asgi_app=fastapi_app)
receiptGenerator.js: Pure JS ESC/POS receipt generator with generateKitchenReceipt, generateCustomerReceipt, generateTestReceipt
POSScreen.js: WebSocket listeners for new_qr_order with beep/flash alerts, uses local receipt generation
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data. QR orders created during testing with guest_name prefix 'TEST_'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified QR Table Ordering feature: 1) QR Guest Menu at /menu/rest_demo_1/{table_hash} - PUBLIC, no auth. 2) Known table hashes: KrGTedTy (Table 1), 14-as7MV (Table 2), wG0lM1YA (Table 3). 3) Menu shows restaurant name, categories, products with GBP prices. 4) Category filtering works. 5) Add to cart with quantity controls, floating cart bar, cart sheet. 6) Place order creates pending order with source='qr'. 7) Order confirmation screen with 3D cloche image. 8) Admin endpoints require auth: GET /api/qr/tables/hashes, POST /api/qr/tables/generate-all-hashes. 9) Socket.IO server emits new_qr_order events. 10) POS screen has WebSocket listeners for QR alerts with beep/flash. 11) receiptGenerator.js generates ESC/POS commands locally (offline capable). 12) 74 pending orders in system.

frontend_tests.qr_guest_menu_loads: PASSED - Restaurant name 'Pizza Palace Updated', Table 1, 11 products
frontend_tests.category_tabs: PASSED - All, Pizzas, Drinks, Sides categories displayed
frontend_tests.category_filtering: PASSED - Clicking category tabs filters products
frontend_tests.add_to_cart: PASSED - + button adds items, quantity controls appear
frontend_tests.floating_cart_bar: PASSED - Shows item count and total in GBP
frontend_tests.cart_sheet: PASSED - Opens with items, quantities, total, guest name input
frontend_tests.order_confirmation: PASSED - 3D cloche image, 'Order Sent to Kitchen', order number, 'Order More' button
frontend_tests.socket_io_connection: PARTIAL - WebSocket fails in preview env, backend emits events correctly

qr_guest_menu_public.description: QR Guest Menu loads at /menu/rest_demo_1/{table_hash} without auth
qr_guest_menu_public.verification: Playwright test confirmed page loads with restaurant name, categories, products

restaurant_info_display.description: Shows restaurant name, categories, products with prices in GBP
restaurant_info_display.verification: Screenshot shows 'Pizza Palace Updated', categories (All, Pizzas, Drinks, Sides), products with £ prices

category_filtering.description: Category filtering works when clicking category tabs
category_filtering.verification: Playwright test clicked category tabs and verified product filtering

add_to_cart.description: Click + button adds items, shows quantity controls, floating cart bar appears
add_to_cart.verification: Playwright test added items, verified quantity controls and floating cart bar

cart_sheet.description: Cart sheet opens with items, quantities, total, guest name input
cart_sheet.verification: Screenshot shows cart sheet with items, quantities, £31.97 total, guest name input

place_order.description: Place Order creates pending order visible in /api/orders/pending
place_order.verification: Backend test confirmed order appears in pending orders

order_confirmation.description: Order confirmation screen shows with 3D cloche image
order_confirmation.verification: Screenshot shows confirmation with cloche image, 'Order Sent to Kitchen', order number

qr_public_apis.verification: Backend tests passed for both endpoints

admin_qr_apis.verification: Backend tests confirmed 403 without auth, 200 with auth

pos_screen_works.description: POS screen loads and functions for logged in users
pos_screen_works.verification: Playwright test logged in as restaurant_admin, POS screen shows 74 pending orders

websocket_server.description: Socket.IO server running, emits new_qr_order events
websocket_server.verification: Backend logs show '[Socket.IO] Emitting new_qr_order to restaurant_rest_demo_1'

receipt_generator.description: JS ESC/POS receipt generator for offline capability
receipt_generator.verification: Code review confirmed generateKitchenReceipt, generateCustomerReceipt with ESC/POS commands

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocked endpoints.
